title: MP Board 10th, 12th Results 2026 (OUT) LIVE: Here's Direct Link To Download Scorecards
description: MP Board Result 2026, MPBSE 10th, 12th Results Latest LIVE Updates: The Class 12 (Higher Secondary) exams were conducted from February 7 to March 3, 2026, while the Class 10 (High School) exams were held from February 11 to March 2, 2026.
